test_cases.input_summary: Finding precedents for a government proposal to break up a dominant technology company, comparing to historical antitrust actions
test_cases.notes: Structural features were sharply defined. Precedents ranged across industries and decades. Analogy strength assessments were honest — weak analogies were not inflated. Misleading analogies section effectively debunked the most common lazy comparison.

test_cases.input_summary: Finding precedents for a national government imposing a social media age verification law
test_cases.notes: Good range of precedents from alcohol age verification to film classification. Sources were specific and locatable. Acknowledged the novelty of the digital context effectively.

test_cases.input_summary: Finding precedents for a city declaring bankruptcy, for a local government finance story
test_cases.notes: Solid selection of municipal bankruptcy precedents across different decades and causes. Differences between cases were well-articulated. Could have been slightly more concise.
